response.justification: Strong senior fullstack profile with 13+ years of experience spanning TypeScript/Node.js, React, and multi-language backend work (Java, DLang, C++). Recent role at re:cinq directly covers TypeScript/Node.js full-stack plus AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching the AI agent development requirement. Solid testing/TDD background, Docker/Kubernetes exposure, and architectural breadth fit the role well. Minor concerns around no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention and a recent caregiving gap, but overall a strong match worth interviewing.
strengths: Recent hands-on TypeScript/Node.js full-stack work plus AI-agent/MCP tooling experience
13+ years across backend, frontend, mobile, embedded — strong polyglot (TS, Java, DLang, Python-adjacent)
Demonstrated TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and testing tooling expertise
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in stated experience
Career gap since October 2025 (caregiving) — recency of active codebase exposure
Heavy DLang investment may indicate stack preferences misaligned with mandated TS/Nest.js stack
